text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Oaks, and Nishino
Flower's weight...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's gone back to normal! Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I wasn't able to do the training regimen you
initially made for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true she might not be in the condition we were
shooting for, but she's done everything she could.
And now...
choice_data_list:
You just have to run with all your might and
leave no regrets behind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'll give it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I have no idea how well she'll be able to
perform in a medium-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she debuted early, she's younger than the
other racers. Her small size puts her at a
disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Plus, her running style for medium distance isn't
the same one Sakura Bakushin O and Yamanin
Zephyr praised before the Oka Sho. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You can never tell what will happen in a race. All I
can do is watch and believe in all of the work
we've put in.
